summary: Local Intelligence & Safety module tested end-to-end. Backend: 20/20 new tests + full regression 127/127 PASSED (auth, dashboard, finance, career, investments, security, local). Frontend: All 8 sections render with correct live NWS weather (87°F Atlanta + 7-day forecast), seeded family Isaac/Ken at Oak View Elementary, 3 sorted gas stations, 3 recall tabs, satellite card (9/12, 2 contacts), 2 offline regions. SOS confirmation modal shows GPS coords (33.74900, -84.38800) inline with CONFIRM SOS button; Test SOS modal correctly shows 'Test SOS?' + 'Run Test' (no tel:911). Invite-family + pause-location flows work. All requested testIDs present. No React Native red screens; no deprecated packages (no expo-av/barcode/background-fetch).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3893 lines — long but acceptable. Consider splitting local-module endpoints into /app/backend/routers/local.py in a future cleanup.
/app/frontend/app/safety-local/index.tsx is 959 lines — could be split into sub-components (WeatherCard, SOSSection, FamilyMap, RecallTabs) for maintainability.

Non-blocking console warnings during web preview: 'shadow* style props deprecated', 'props.pointerEvents deprecated', and 'useNativeDriver not supported on web' for the SOS pulsing animation (expected on web only; works on native).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all sections, testIDs, modals, and flows verified)

seed_data_creation: Reused existing /seed-demo for test1@plos.app which seeds Isaac + Ken family members at Oak View Elementary, saved vehicle 2015 Toyota RAV4, and cuisine_preference=Filipino. No new test seeds required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Local module endpoints are at /api/local/*. The auth fixture in test_local_module.py auto-runs /api/seed-demo to ensure idempotent state. Live API tests (NWS, openFDA, CPSC SaferProducts, NHTSA) currently return is_live:true; tests are written to accept graceful-degradation (is_live:false + error string) if any external API is intermittently down. Frontend testIDs follow the convention defined in agent_to_agent_context_note (module-safety-local, weather-card, sos-button, sos-confirm, sos-cancel, test-sos, share-location, satellite-card, family-{id}, invite-family, pause-location, gas-{idx}, recall-tab-{food|products|vehicle}, vin-input, check-vin, recall-{tab}-{idx}, offline-{id}, invite-name, invite-generate).
rca_of_issue: No issues found — feature meets spec.
